plugins.name: Top.gg Voter Role
plugins.short_description: Automatically give Discord roles to Top.gg voters with auto-expiry.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns a Discord role to users who upvote your bot on Top.gg. Roles are granted instantly after voting and automatically removed when the vote expires. Integrates with RoleLogic's role link system to reward and recognize community members who support your Discord bot on Top.gg.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Genshin Player Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats and progress.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Genshin Impact player stats. Set up custom conditions using Adventure Rank, World Level, Spiral Abyss progress, or other in-game data to reward players and highlight achievements. Roles stay synced as players progress. View a list of verified Genshin Impact players in your Discord server to track linked accounts and their stats.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: YouTube Subscriber Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles to YouTube channel subscribers automatically.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles to members subscribed to a YouTube channel. Members verify through Google OAuth, and the plugin periodically checks subscription status via the YouTube Data API. Roles are dynamically assigned to active subscribers and removed when they unsubscribe, keeping your Discord server roles synced with your YouTube audience.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: GitHub Contributor Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on GitHub contributions to any repository.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on GitHub contribution activity. Configure conditions using commits, pull requests, merged PRs, or issues on any public repository. Members link their Discord and GitHub accounts, and the plugin continuously tracks their contributions to keep roles synced with real activity.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Twitch Follower Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on Twitch follow and subscription status.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on Twitch channel follow and subscription status. Users link their Discord and Twitch accounts, then roles are automatically assigned based on configurable conditions including follower status, follow tenure, subscription tier, and more. Uses Twitch EventSub for real-time monitoring of follow and subscribe events to keep roles synced.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Member Origin Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on member origin — country, timezone, and language.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that assigns Discord roles based on member origin detected from HTTP headers and browser APIs. Automatically detects country, timezone, language, platform, and browser to assign roles matching your conditions. Built-in anti-fraud features block VPN users, spoofed identities, and impossible travel to ensure role eligibility.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Steam Player Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on Steam profile stats, playtime, and account data.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Steam profile data. Members verify through Steam OpenID, and roles are assigned based on configurable conditions including games owned, playtime, achievements, account age, ban status, Steam group membership, and country. Background data refresh keeps roles continuously synced with real Steam activity.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Referral Code Role
plugins.short_description: Grant Discord roles via redeemable referral codes with customizable rules.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that grants a Discord role when a member redeems a code. Hand out codes for Kickstarter rewards, podcast shout-outs, event wristbands, QR-coded flyers — anything that needs a "prove you have this and get the role" flow. Built for scale: the Role Link sync path supports 100 000+ members per role link via the chunked upload API, with atomic swaps.
plugins.author: RoleLogic

plugins.name: Roblox Player Role
plugins.short_description: Give Discord roles based on Roblox account data, group membership, and in-game stats.
plugins.description: A RoleLogic plugin that automatically assigns Discord roles based on Roblox account data and in-game progression. Members link their Roblox account once, and roles are assigned using configurable conditions across account-level data (age, Premium status, badges, gamepasses, assets, social counts), group membership and rank thresholds, and per-game statistics like playtime, levels, wins/losses, and custom fields. Game stats can be delivered via direct server push or polled from Roblox Open Cloud DataStore, keeping Discord roles synced with real Roblox activity.
plugins.author: RoleLogic
